topic: Hingoli earthquake damages 105 houses in Maharashtra
headline: 4.7 MAGNITUDE EARTHQUAKE IN MAHARASHTRA DAMAGES 105 HOUSES, LEAVES LOCAL POPULATION IN NEED
summary: A 4.7 magnitude earthquake struck Hingoli district in Maharashtra, resulting in minor structural damage but no reported casualties. The earthquake damaged 105 houses in the area. The region has been experiencing seismic activity, with a series of micro earthquakes recorded in nearby areas. The earthquake has affected the local population, with some villages relying on water tankers for their daily needs.
